brand_principles.logo_concept: Isologotype — the wordmark 'delicut' with two sidebars (slashes) that reinforce the concept of 'cut' or 'break'.
brand_principles.typography_concept: Sans-serif for roundness, freshness, and youth. Conveys practical quality without gourmet ornaments.
brand_principles.color_concept: Green for healthy and natural. Beige/cream for raw essence. Warm palette overall.
brand_principles.shape_language: Rounded forms for featured boxes and containers. Slash/cut elements as brand motifs.
brand_principles.logo_min_size: 15mm / 45px full logo. 8.5mm / 25px for avatar/favicon responsive version.
brand_principles.brand_voice: Simple, maximum impact with minimum elements. Practical quality. No gourmet pretension.

colors.name: Spinach
colors.role: Primary brand color. Conveys health, nature, and freshness. Used for backgrounds, headlines, CTA buttons, and dominant panel color.

colors.name: Grenade
colors.role: Accent color for urgency, offers, discounts, and CTA highlights. Used for badges, price callouts, and promotional elements.

colors.name: Pumpkin
colors.role: Secondary accent. Used alongside Grenade for warmth, offer elements, and CTA buttons.

colors.name: Cream
colors.role: Background color and body copy color on dark panels. Conveys raw, natural, premium feel.

colors.name: Warm Grey
colors.role: Neutral secondary. Used for backgrounds, dividers, and subtle UI elements.

colors.name: Curry
colors.role: Extended palette. Warm appetite-driving tone used in food photography and seasonal content.

colors.name: Masala
colors.role: Extended palette. Earthy, grounded tone for lifestyle and food contexts.

colors.name: Cinnamon
colors.role: Extended palette. Warm spice tone for food-adjacent content.

colors.name: Courgette
colors.role: Extended palette. Fresh vegetable tone for ingredient and health content.

fonts.name: Maison Bold
fonts.role: Logo typography. Used for the primary /delicut/ wordmark.
fonts.prompt_inject: bold sans-serif, tight tracking, clean geometric letterforms

fonts.name: Maison Demi
fonts.role: Main typography. Primary headline font across all brand communications.
fonts.prompt_inject: demi-bold sans-serif, slightly tight tracking, modern and clean

fonts.name: Maison Light
fonts.role: Slash / accent typography. Used for sidebars and structural brand elements.
fonts.prompt_inject: light weight sans-serif, clean and minimal

fonts.name: Maison Medium
fonts.role: Content typography. Used for body copy, descriptions, and supporting text.
fonts.prompt_inject: medium weight sans-serif, highly legible, neutral and clean

image_prompt_palette: Brand color palette: deep spinach green (#043F12) as primary, warm cream (#F9F4ED) for backgrounds and light text, grenade red (#FF3F1F) and pumpkin orange (#EA5D29) as accents. Extended palette includes curry yellow (#D57903), masala brown (#917136), cinnamon (#AC7950), and courgette yellow-green (#C4AD3A).
image_prompt_typography: Typography: Maison font family. Bold/Demi weights for headlines with tight tracking. Clean geometric sans-serif. No decorative or serif fonts.
